title: Anchor-level template gates
description:
Let a template anchor declare gate presets that the apply engine attaches to the bound anchor issue at apply time.

## Background

Template anchors carry only a `name` today (`AnchorSlot`, templates.rs:243-246) and cannot declare gates, while node gates already flow from `TemplateNode.gates` (templates.rs:286) through `attach_node_gates`->`apply_gate_preset` (commands/template.rs:832, called at :603). Attaching a completion gate to a bound container anchor needs `AnchorSlot` to carry gates and the apply engine to attach them through that same path.

## Success Criteria

- [hard] REQ-13: a template anchor accepts a declarative gates field, the loader validates it like node gates, and applying a template attaches the anchor's gate presets to the bound anchor issue through the shared preset path.

## Notes

Extend `AnchorSlot` (templates.rs:243-246) with a `#[serde(default)] gates: Vec<String>` field, validate it in the template loader like node gates, and attach the anchor's presets to the bound anchor via a shared attach-gates-by-name helper factored out of `attach_node_gates` (commands/template.rs:832,603). Engine work; anchor gates stay declarative strings in templates.toml.
